sentence: My father is a _____ at the local school.
explanation: TEACH → teacher (suffix -er: person who does the action)

sentence: The _____ fixed our car yesterday.
explanation: DRIVE → driver (suffix -er: person who does the action)

sentence: She wants to be a _____ when she grows up.
explanation: SING → singer (suffix -er: person who does the action)

sentence: The _____ brought us our food quickly.
hint: A person who serves food in a restaurant
explanation: WAIT → waiter (suffix -er: person who serves)

sentence: He is a good _____. He swims every day.
explanation: SWIM → swimmer (suffix -er: double the final consonant + -er)

sentence: The _____ painted a beautiful picture.
explanation: PAINT → painter (suffix -er: person who does the action)

sentence: My sister is a fast _____.
explanation: READ → reader (suffix -er: person who does the action)

sentence: The _____ visited our school today.
hint: A person who acts in films or plays
explanation: ACT → actor (suffix -or: person who does the action)

sentence: She works as a _____ at the hospital.
hint: A person who visits a place
explanation: VISIT → visitor (suffix -or: person who visits)

sentence: It is a _____ day today. The sun is shining.
hint: An adjective describing weather with sun
explanation: SUN → sunny (suffix -y: having the quality of sun)

sentence: Be careful! The road is very _____.
explanation: ICE → icy (suffix -y: having the quality of ice)

sentence: The children are very _____ today.
explanation: NOISE → noisy (suffix -y: replace -e and add -y)

sentence: It was a _____ night. The wind was blowing hard.
explanation: STORM → stormy (suffix -y: having the quality of storms)

sentence: The room is very _____. Please clean it.
explanation: DIRT → dirty (suffix -y: having the quality of dirt)

sentence: She is a _____ person. She always helps others.
explanation: HELP → helpful (suffix -ful: full of help)

sentence: The garden looks _____. There are many flowers.
explanation: BEAUTY → beautiful (suffix -ful: change -y to -i and add -ful)

sentence: Be _____ when you cross the road.
explanation: CARE → careful (suffix -ful: full of care)

sentence: I am _____ for your help. Thank you!
explanation: THANK → thankful (suffix -ful: full of thanks)

sentence: The movie was very _____. I enjoyed it a lot.
explanation: WONDER → wonderful (suffix -ful: full of wonder)

sentence: He is a good _____. He plays football every day.
explanation: PLAY → player (suffix -er: person who does the action)

sentence: The _____ cleaned all the rooms in the hotel.
explanation: WORK → worker (suffix -er: person who does the action)

sentence: It is very _____ outside. Take an umbrella.
explanation: RAIN → rainy (suffix -y: having the quality of rain)

sentence: The soup is very _____. I like it.
explanation: TASTE → tasty (suffix -y: replace -e and add -y)

sentence: She is always _____. She smiles a lot.
explanation: CHEER → cheerful (suffix -ful: full of cheer)

sentence: The baby is very _____. She sleeps a lot.
explanation: SLEEP → sleepy (suffix -y: having the quality of sleep)

sentence: My brother is a _____ in a big company.
explanation: MANAGE → manager (suffix -er: person who manages, drop -e and add -er)
